fn greet(name: &str) -> String {
    format!("Hello, {name}!")
}

fn count_words(text: &str) -> usize {
    text.split_whitespace().count()
}

fn truncate(s: &str, max_len: usize) -> &str {
    if s.len() <= max_len {
        s
    } else {
        &s[..max_len]
    }
}

fn is_empty(input: &str) -> bool {
    input.is_empty()
}
